---
title: "Shiny App"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

::: {style="max-width: 720px; margin: 3rem auto; text-align: center;"}

## Interactive Survey Explorer

Browse ATTCLIMATE survey variables by thematic section, inspect distributions across survey waves, and visualise how attitudes have evolved over time.

The explorer runs as a separate Shiny application and opens in a new browser tab.

<p style="margin: 2rem 0;">
<a href="https://mguinjoan.shinyapps.io/attclimate/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">
Open the Shiny App &nearr;
</a>
</p>

<p class="text-muted-theme" style="font-size: 0.85rem;">
mguinjoan.shinyapps.io/attclimate
</p>

:::
